prompt_text: A dignified middle-aged ancient Chinese scholar-official father, lean build, stern square face with tired kind eyes, streaks of gray hair in a neat topknot, dark teal traditional robe, subtle chest-pain gesture, restrained authority mixed with deep paternal tenderness, medium close-up, facing along the established dialogue axis, seen from a slightly low angle below eye level. He sits behind a scholar's desk with his shoulder line slightly collapsed from fatigue, his expression gentle yet guilty, as if offering belated protection to his daughter; his lips soften but his brow remains faintly burdened. Blurred official documents occupy the lower foreground like a barrier between him and his daughter. Interior of an ancient noble hall, old wood desk, muted gray-teal and dark ink tones, low-saturation warm-cool contrast, soft natural window light mixed with dim amber interior glow, side-back light shaping the wrinkles at his eyes and the weariness in his face. cinematic historical drama realism, Song dynasty aesthetic, restrained emotional tension, shallow depth of field, highly detailed, subtle film grain

A blurred glossy inkstone catches black reflections in the foreground corner like compressed emotion. In the lower-right foreground, the moving brush tip is blurred, indicating the father still writing. The background recedes into a dark, near-empty hall, deep charcoal negative space making her pale face appear colder and more suspended in time.
